settings_play_fullscreen_tooltip: Automatically enter fullscreen when entering Play mode
settings_fullscreen_mode_tooltip:
Fullscreen Windowed: borderless window covering the screen.
Exclusive Fullscreen is planned for a future release.
settings_enable_f11_tooltip: Toggle fullscreen with the F11 key during Play mode
settings_hotkey_help:
The hotkey is F11 by default. You can rebind it in
Edit → Shortcuts → Fullscreen Play.
settings_show_toast_tooltip: Show a brief overlay with exit instructions when entering fullscreen
settings_show_on_refocus_tooltip: Re-show the toast when the fullscreen window regains focus (e.g. after alt-tab)
settings_toast_duration_tooltip: How long the toast notification is visible
